description: Churn prediction model for DTC supplement subscriptions, applied to IonWave

avg_monthly_churn_supplements.source: Recharge benchmark reports 2022-2024, ProfitWell, IonWave benchmark_data.json

retention_curve.description: Typical DTC supplement subscription cohort retention
retention_curve.source: Recharge cohort data, ProfitWell, industry analyses

curve.note: Cliff completes. Survivors 2x more likely to stay long-term.

retention_curve.key_insight: The battle is won or lost in Months 1-3. A customer who survives Month 3 is significantly more likely to stay long-term. This is where onboarding, expectation-setting, and habit formation have maximum leverage.

churn_signals.description: Behavioral signals that predict churn, ranked by predictive strength

signals.intervention: Personal outreach within 48 hours. Ask why. Offer frequency adjustment.
Full dunning stack (smart retries + card updater + email/SMS). Even after recovery, flag for engagement sequence.
signals.note: Recovery does not eliminate risk — recovered customers still churn at 2x rate

signals.intervention: Immediate resolution. Follow up 48 hours later. Flag in churn scoring.

signals.signal: Reduced order frequency (e.g., monthly → every 6 weeks)
signals.intervention: Re-engagement content sequence. Check if product satisfaction issue.
signals.note: MISSING from Danilo's model — should add

signals.intervention: Thank for staying. Offer value-add content instead of discount.
signals.note: MISSING from Danilo's model — should add

signals.signal: Email engagement dropped (>50% open rate decline from baseline)
signals.intervention: Switch to SMS channel. Send high-value content (not promotional).
Content that drives to site (new article, results calculator, community).

signals.signal: Acquired via deep discount / promo code
signals.intervention: Fast-track onboarding. Emphasize value over savings from Day 1.
signals.note: CRITICAL addition — this is a signal at acquisition time, not during subscription

signals.intervention: Extra engagement. Do not offer discounts (reinforces cancel-for-discount pattern).

composite_risk_scoring.description: Recommended tiered intervention based on combined signals

tiers.trigger: Skipped shipment + support complaint, OR skipped + payment failure
tiers.intervention: Immediate personal outreach (email + SMS from founder) within 48 hours

tiers.trigger: Any 2 of: skip, frequency reduction, email disengagement, downgrade
tiers.intervention: Automated retention offer (pause option, free gift, science content)

tiers.trigger: Any 1 of: skip, frequency reduction, email disengagement
tiers.intervention: Re-engagement content (why you subscribed, results stories, usage tips)

tiers.trigger: Strong email engagement, no skips, regular portal visits
tiers.intervention: Standard engagement (loyalty program, early access, community)

dunning_model.description: Involuntary churn recovery — highest ROI retention activity

stack.component: Smart retry timing (1, 3, 5, 7 days post-failure, varying time of day)
Card updater services (Visa Account Updater, Mastercard ABU via Stripe)
Dunning email sequence (4 emails over 14 days)
Grace period (10 days before hard cancellation)

dunning_model.churn_impact: Reduces total monthly churn by 1.5-3 percentage points
dunning_model.ltv_impact: At 12% base churn, reducing to 10% extends avg lifetime from 8.3 to 10 months = 20% LTV increase
dunning_model.ionwave_note: This is the single highest-ROI retention activity. Requires zero customer psychology change — purely payment mechanics. Implement from Day 1.

intelligence_gaps.impact: All predictions based on industry benchmarks
intelligence_gaps.upgrade_path: Collect 90 days of actual churn data post-launch. Recalibrate model at Day 90.

intelligence_gaps.impact: If onset >60 days, Month 1-3 cliff will be worse than industry benchmark
intelligence_gaps.upgrade_path: Mine Seaonic reviews for time-to-value language (CSP-002 priority #1)

intelligence_gaps.gap: Stay AI's churn prediction claims not independently verified
intelligence_gaps.impact: Cannot confirm if AI platform justifies 2x cost premium
intelligence_gaps.upgrade_path: Request case study data from Stay AI. Compare with manual Klaviyo flows.
